use_cases: Displaying user location within a website's hierarchical structure
Enabling quick navigation back to parent pages in e-commerce product catalogs
Providing visual context for current page position in content-heavy sites
ai_summary: A clean, minimalist breadcrumb navigation component featuring a home icon, chevron separators, and clickable navigation links. The component uses standard Tailwind CSS styling with a subtle gray color palette and supports flexible layout with wrapping. Ideal for e-commerce product pages and hierarchical website navigation, providing users with clear path context and easy backtracking to parent sections.
